name: Heat Pump Calculator
seo_title: Heat Pump Calculator – Air to Water kW
seo_description: Calculate kw_termico, kw_electrico with our free air-to-water heat pump calculator. Just enter area_m2, insulation, acs_personas and get results instantly.
example_label: Calculatete aerothermal heat pump for 100m2 home with 35C flow temperature.

range_hints.area_m2: Conditioned floor area. Home: 80-200 m², Passive house: same area, much lower demand
range_hints.acs_personas: DHW demand ≈ 0.2 kW/person. 4 people ≈ 0.8 kW additional thermal load

result_context: Demanda thermal total: {kw_termico} kW. power electrical absorbida: {kw_electrico} kW (with COP estimated of {cop_estimado}).
formula_display: P_térmica = area × Coef(W/m²) ÷ 1000 + Personas × 0.2 | P_eléctrica = P_térmica ÷ COP
steps: Calculatete demand of heating: 120 m² × 50 W/m² = 6000 W = 6.0 kW
Calculatete demand of ACS: 4 people × 0.2 kW = 0.8 kW
Select pump of heat commercial of 7-8 kW thermal
mistakes: Not considering the temperature outdoor of design — the COP drops with temperatures low cero
Infradimensionar to ACS — in winter the demand of ACS can ser greater that the of heating
Ignorar the soporte electrical of support — many pumps carry resistance of backup
description: Heat pump sizing based on heating load and flow temperature.
